name: HTS_COVERAGES
description: Stores the aggregated actual and baseline durations for a schedule. Also stores the aggregate durations for assigned and open shifts

columns.Name: COVERAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Table primary key. Ideally values are automatically incremented using a database sequence

columns.Name: COVERAGE_IN_SYNC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag column to indicate if the coverage data is in sync with the schedule and demand

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the relevant schedule coverage calculation

columns.Name: AGGREGATED_BASELINE_DEMAND
columns.Comments: Aggregate baseline demand value, measured in minutes (BASELINE)

columns.Name: AGGREGATED_ACTUAL_DEMAND
columns.Comments: Aggregate actual demand value, measured in minutes (actual)

columns.Name: AGGREGATED_ASSIGNED_SHIFTS
columns.Comments:
Aggregate duration , in minutes, for the assigned shifts
ALUE

columns.Name: AGGREGATED_OPEN_SHIFTS
columns.Comments: Aggregate duration, in minutes, for the open shifts value

columns.Name: RECALCULATION_ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: ESS process request ID used in the most recent coverage recalculation

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Standard enterprise identifier column for multi tenancy support

columns.Name: COVERAGE_CALC_DATE
columns.Comments: Date and time when the coverage was last calculated

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
